name: Scratch and Peck Feeds Chicken Starter Kit - Scratch and Peck 18% Poultry Feed, Layer Grit Supplement, Organic Herbs Supplement
description: Scratch and Peck Feed Naturally Free Organic Layer 18% Poultry Feed, 40-lb bag—Keep your companions from getting too corny with Scratch and Peck Feed Naturally Free Organic Layer 18% Chicken Feed. This corn-free chicken feed is professionally formulated with a minimum of 18% protein. It’s ideal during increased egg production or molting seasons and is suitable for all waterfowl including ducks and geese. This chicken feed is certified organic by the USDA and verified by the Non-GMO Project. It is crafted using safe, healthy and high-quality ingredients that remain raw and unprocessed to create a whole grain unpelletized feed. This organic bird feed is perfect for fermenting and does not contain any soy ingredients.
